account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents access to Spring Framework 6 features and is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum supported version; compiling with Java 11 will fail.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts will occur.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add empty url element to pom.xml to satisfy Maven model validation or schema requirements.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.17 to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; running Spring Boot 3.x on Java 11 results in runtime errors due to missing APIs and module system incompatibilities.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail to compile if the source/target compatibility is set to 11 while using Java 17-specific features or if the build environment enforces JDK 17.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.2 to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.2.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; dependency resolution will fail or runtime errors will occur due to API mismatches.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-web dependency to the project.
Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency to the project.
Add jjwt-api dependency for JWT handling.
Add jjwt-impl dependency for JWT implementation.
Add jjwt-jackson dependency for JWT Jackson serialization.
Update project description from 'Demo project for Spring Boot' to 'Project gateway service'.
Add empty url tag to the project metadata.

gateway-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Exclude SecurityAutoConfiguration to prevent Spring Security auto-configuration from activating in the gateway service.

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comments to explain Spring Cloud Gateway configuration properties.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: gateway: #Phần cài đặt chính của Spring Cloud Gateway, cung cấp các cấu hình để định tuyến các yêu cầu tới các service khác

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comment explaining service discovery locator configuration.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: enabled: true # Tự động phát hiện và đăng ký các service được quản lý bởi Consul để định tuyến

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comment explaining load-balanced URI for account-service.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after:
uri: lb://account-service # URL đích mà Gateway sẽ chuyển tiếp yêu cầu. Sử dụng lb (load balance - Cân bằng tải)
          # định tuyến tới service account-service

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comment explaining path predicate for account-service.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: - Path=/account/** # Điều kiện áp dụng cho route. Trong trường hợp này, yêu cầu bất kì đường dẫn bắt đầu bằng /account

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comment explaining filters section for account-service.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: filters: # Bộ lọc xử lý hoặc biến đổi yêu cầu trước khi chuyển tiếp.

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add Vietnamese comment explaining RewritePath filter for account-service.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: - RewritePath=/account/(?<path>.*), /$\{path} # Loại bỏ phần /account/ khỏi url trước khi đến service account-service

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add commented-out RemoveRequestHeader filter for product-service.
Add Vietnamese comment explaining Consul configuration section.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after: consul: # Cấu hình để kết nối với Consul cho việc phát hiện và quản lý service

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Add main configuration block to set reactive web application type and allow bean overriding.
gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.after:
main:
    web-application-type: reactive # Thiết lập ứng dụng theo dạng reactive(phản ứng), tức là sử dụng Spring WebFlux thay vì Spring MVC truyền thống
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true # Cho phép định nghĩa nhiều bean có cùng tên, và bean định nghĩa sau sẽ bị đè lên các định nghĩa trước

gateway-service/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Move config import statement to end of file and add Vietnamese comment.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.x to support Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 17.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to align with the target JDK.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to match the new Spring Boot 3.x release train.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x, leading to dependency resolution conflicts or runtime classpath errors.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add empty url tag to POM metadata.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Explicitly configure Feign client base packages to ensure correct component scanning.
Replace Feign client dependency with a service interface to decouple the controller from the HTTP client implementation.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.why_exists: The class ProductClient is no longer imported or used, likely removed or refactored in the broader migration; keeping the reference would cause a compile error if the class is deleted or package-private.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove unused imports and fields related to logging, JSON mapping, and data persistence that are no longer needed in the controller.
Narrow wildcard imports to specific annotations to improve code clarity and reduce namespace pollution.
Replace manual getter and setter methods with the Lombok @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.before: public Long getId() { return id; } ... public void setProductIds(List<Long> productIds) { this.productIds = productIds; }

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace manual getter and setter methods with Lombok's @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.before: public Long getId() { return id; } public void setId(Long id) { this.id = id; } public String getName() { return name; } public void setName(String name) { this.name = name; } public int getPrice() { return price; } public void setPrice(int price) { this.price = price; }

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed optimizations, and the migration target is explicitly Spring Boot 3.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; keeping java.version=11 would cause compilation failures or incorrect bytecode generation for Java 17 features.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.2.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using the old version would cause dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors due to API changes.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update project description to be more specific.
Add empty url element to the POM.

product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 17+), causing compile errors for missing classes.
